name: `registry`
function: List the whole collective registry, grouped by type.
label: registry
reuse: any seed needing a filed, searchable asset registry

name: `registry show`
function: Show one designation's full record card.
label: registry show
reuse: any seed needing a filed, searchable asset registry

name: `registry find`
function: Search the registry by designation, name, label, function, or tag.
label: registry find
reuse: any seed needing a filed, searchable asset registry

name: `registry type`
function: List every designation of one type (RM, NPC, CMD...).
label: registry type
reuse: any seed needing a filed, searchable asset registry

name: `registry status`
function: List every designation with one status (active, prototype...).
label: registry status
reuse: any seed needing a filed, searchable asset registry

name: `@sg`
function: System-generate a filed item pattern into the world (wizard+).
label: @sg
reuse: the admin generation verb; every seed inherits it

name: `qa gate`
function: Grade one filed object against the readiness checklist.
label: qa gate
reuse: the global Safety+QA spine; composes with the registry

name: `qa gate all`
function: Grade every filed object (the registry self-audit).
label: qa gate all
reuse: the global Safety+QA spine; composes with the registry

name: `safety review`
function: Rate one object's risk (readiness, not compliance).
label: safety review
reuse: the global Safety+QA spine; composes with the registry

name: `docs check`
function: Sweep the key documentation files for gaps.
label: docs check
reuse: the global Safety+QA spine; composes with the registry

name: `pm status`
function: Project status dashboard, computed from the registry + QualityGate.
label: pm status
reuse: the project control panel; composes registry + QualityGate

name: `pm metrics`
function: Project metrics: objects filed, QA readiness, docs gaps.
label: pm metrics
reuse: the project control panel; composes registry + QualityGate

name: `law`
function: Legal/policy awareness over tracked sources (never legal advice).
label: law
reuse: the compliance-awareness lens over any source registry

name: `truth check`
function: VeritasGate: check that the project's claims match reality.
label: truth check
reuse: the claims-vs-reality gate; composes with any repo's docs+registry

name: `career`
function: Career Evidence Sign: map CodeForge work to job-ready skills with repo proof.
label: career

name: `pioneer`
function: Pioneer Mode: bold-but-honest engineering framework (doctrine, risk ladder, experiments).
label: pioneer

name: `inspect`
function: Inspect the forge: on-demand green/yellow/red frame-up composed from the project's gates.
label: inspect

name: `functions`
function: Hardware Store functions check: run a live demo of each reusable part.
label: functions

name: `terminal`
function: The in-game computer: one console to run every diagnostic program.
label: terminal

name: `blueprint`
function: Blueprint: browse, read, or render a forged plan (idea -> spec -> HTML).
label: blueprint

name: `@forge`
function: the Foundry: propose a part skeleton, approve, and generate it into the sandbox (owner-only).
label: @forge
notes: ADMIN verb, min_rank owner. Two-step: propose (writes nothing) -> approve -> generate into workspace/ sandbox.

name: `@arch`
function: step through the arch into the Proving Ground: review the Foundry's forged candidates (owner, read-only).
label: @arch
notes: ADMIN verb, min_rank owner. Read-only review of the workspace/ sandbox candidates; promotion into parts/ stays a human branch -> PR step.

name: `evolution`
function: Blueprint Evolution Lab, read-only: list and show recorded candidate bake-off runs. Never executes a run or promotes a candidate.
label: evolution
notes: CORE verb. Read-only window on reports/evolution/ runs; producing a run is `make evolution`, never a MUD side effect.

name: `loop trace`
function: Trace a part through every manufacturing stage and file evidence.
label: loop trace
reuse: trace any reusable part through the manufacturing loop

name: `chronicle`
function: The Chronicle, read-only: show the ship's filed memory (newest first), optionally one kind. Never mutates the store.
label: chronicle
notes: CORE verb. Read-only window on the Chronicle ledger; a tampered ledger surfaces its integrity failure rather than crashing the tick.

name: `retention`
function: Retention doctor, read-only: show what the Chronicle keeps, what is eligible for review, and what a hold protects. Never disposes or removes.
label: retention
notes: CORE verb. Read-only R1 doctor over the Chronicle; real disposition arrives owner-gated in R2.

name: `coupling`
function: Engine coupling report, read-only: trace the runtime module closure and list what a runtime cast could shed. Changes nothing (detachment D1).
label: coupling
notes: CORE verb. Read-only D1 report; spawns import-trace subprocesses so it is a few seconds.

name: encounters
function: the after-action log: recent combat encounters and their tallies
label: encounters
notes: Read-only CORE verb rendering parts/encounter_log (the observed leg of the aggression loop). Tick-reachable; renders the bounded ring + tallies, never mutates.

name: use
label: use
notes: CORE verb firing a job's usable ability (parts/world/abilities). A strike reuses combat.land_hit; a heal restores HP; each spends MP. Tick-reachable; refuses no-calling / unknown / wrong-job / no-MP / bad-target.

name: skills
function: list the abilities your calling can wield
label: skills
notes: Read-only CORE verb listing a calling's moveset (parts/world/abilities.render_abilities). Tick-reachable; never mutates.

name: @flush-encounters
function: flush the after-action tallies into the Chronicle as metrics (owner)
label: @flush-encounters
notes: Owner-gated ADMIN verb (the trusted boundary run IN the server process, where the encounter tallies live). Aggregates parts/encounter_log tallies into the Chronicle via parts/encounter_flush; the tick never reaches it. Slice 2 of encounter telemetry (Convergence Review 2026-07-17).

name: join
label: join
notes: The Orders faction join verb (parts/world/orders.swear_order): lists the Row when bare, swears a named hero to an Order and persists it. Refuses unnamed / unknown Order.

name: wallet
label: wallet
notes: Reads session.coins (persisted characters.coins, Alembic a2b8f1e6c04d). Coins are earned per kill (combat._coin_reward: level x tier, levelless foe pays xp//10) and will be spent at shops.

name: shop
label: shop
notes: The shop economy verb (parts/world/shop). Finds the merchant in the player's room.

name: buy
label: buy
notes: The shop economy verb (parts/world/shop). Finds the merchant in the player's room.

name: sell
label: sell
notes: The shop economy verb (parts/world/shop). Finds the merchant in the player's room.

name: quaff
label: quaff
notes: parts/world/consumables.quaff: spend a carried consumable, restore hp/mp.

name: ask
function: ask an NPC about a topic (ask <npc> about <topic>)
label: ask
notes: parts/world/npcs.ask: topic-based conversation over Npc.topics (keyword -> reply lines). Bare `ask <npc>` lists topics. Backward-compatible with `talk` (no-topics NPC has nothing to ask).
